title: Authors and Citation
text: Lyu W (2026). coupling: Coupling Coordination Analysis. R package version 0.0.0.9000, https://stscl.github.io/coupling/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {coupling: Coupling Coordination Analysis},   author = {Wenbo Lyu},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},   url = {https://stscl.github.io/coupling/}, }

title: ccd | Coupling Coordination Analysis
text: Coupling Coordination Analysis coupling R package coupling coordination analysis based coupling coordination degree (CCD) models. incorporates metacoupling frameworks characterize cross-scale linkages, flows, feedbacks within among coupled systems. Refer package documentation https://stscl.github.io/coupling/ detailed information.

title: ccd | Coupling Coordination Analysis
text: Install CRAN : Install binary version R-universe : Install source code GitHub :
code: install.packages("coupling", dep = TRUE) install.packages("coupling",                  repos = c("https://stscl.r-universe.dev",                            "https://cloud.r-project.org"),                  dep = TRUE) if (!requireNamespace("devtools")) {     install.packages("devtools") } devtools::install_github("stscl/coupling",                          build_vignettes = TRUE,                          dep = TRUE)

title: ccd | Coupling Coordination Analysis

title: Coupling Coordination Degree (CCD) — ccd
code: ccd(data, weight = NULL, method = c("standard", "wang", "fan"), threads = 1)

title: Coupling Coordination Degree (CCD) — ccd
text: data numeric matrix data.frame. Rows observations, columns indicators. weight Numeric vector indicator weights. Must length equal ncol(data). NULL, equal weights used. method Coupling model. One "standard", "wang", "fan". threads Number threads used computation.

title: Coupling Coordination Degree (CCD) — ccd
text: data.frame : C: coupling degree D: coordination degree

title: Metacoupling Analysis — metacoupling
code: metacoupling(   data,   swm_peri = NULL,   swm_tele = NULL,   weight = NULL,   method = c("standard", "wang", "fan"),   threads = 1 )

title: Metacoupling Analysis — metacoupling
text: data numeric matrix data.frame. Rows observations, columns indicators. swm_peri numeric matrix representing peri (local) spatial weight matrix. Must square dimension equal nrow(data). NULL, zero matrix used. swm_tele numeric matrix representing tele (long-distance) spatial weight matrix. Must square dimension equal nrow(data). NULL, zero matrix used. weight Numeric vector indicator weights. Must length equal ncol(data). NULL, equal weights used. method Coupling model. One "standard", "wang", "fan". threads Number threads used computation.

title: Metacoupling Analysis — metacoupling
text: data.frame : Intra_C: intra-system coupling degree Intra_D: intra-system coordination degree Peri_C: peri-coupling degree Peri_D: peri coordination degree Tele_C: tele-coupling degree Tele_D: tele coordination degree

title: Metacoupling Analysis — metacoupling
text: Input values normalized [0, 1]. Spatial weight matrices typically symmetric.
